title: Mecranium purpurascens
taxonomy: Mecranium purpurascens is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Mecranium, which is a group of plants commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The family Melastomataceae is a large and diverse group of plants, also known as the melastome or Memecyclaceae. The species Mecranium purpurascens is often classified as an evergreen shrub or small tree. Its classification within the plant kingdom is further specified by its order (Myrtales), class (Magnoliopsida), and kingdom (Plantae).
